name: Fork / Release / Upgrade maintenance

B: Keep self-host backend differences inside mem0-plugin/scripts/_mem0_client.py and mem0-plugin/scripts/_selfhost.py or update UPSTREAM.md with a justified overlay path.
C: Avoid rewriting official skills and hook orchestration; route backend calls through the shared adapter.
Return explicit unsupported or shim responses for degraded self-host MCP tools.
D: Attach health and smoke-test output to release notes.
Keep install scripts from writing API keys, personal endpoints, or local machine paths into the repo.

open_questions: Should Cloud fallback remain enabled by default when MEM0_PROVIDER is unset?
Will multiple self-host endpoint profiles be supported?
Is Cloud-to-self-host memory migration in scope for this fork?
